title: Ditaxis micrandra
taxonomy: Ditaxis micrandra is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It belongs to the genus Ditaxis, which is a group of flowering plants known for their small, fragrant flowers and unique seed pods. Ditaxis micrandra is often found in humid, subtropical environments with rich soil and partial shade. The plant's classification is an important aspect of its identification and understanding of its ecological role.
